resources.name: Safe Call Now
resources.description: Confidential crisis referral service specifically for first responders and their families

resources.name: Crisis Text Line
resources.description: Text HOME to 741741 — free, confidential crisis counseling via text

resources.name: Veterans Crisis Line
resources.description: Call or text 988 then press 1 — also available to first responders

resources.name: SAMHSA National Helpline
resources.description: Free, confidential help for substance use and mental health disorders

resources.name: First Responder Support Network
resources.description: Peer support and trauma recovery resources for first responders

resources.name: Code Green Campaign
resources.description: Mental health awareness and resources for first responders
